• • • • • • , you’re getting easy access to exclusive business discounts with your work account.

Business financing available at Microsoft Store

Get the Microsoft products you need today with flexible payment options from PNC Vendor Finance or Surface All Access for Business.

Business financing available at Microsoft Store

Get the Microsoft products you need today with flexible payment options from PNC Vendor Finance or Surface All Access for Business.

Surface All Access for Business PNC Vendor Finance

Surface All Access for Business

Powerful tech, flexible terms—lease Surface for Business and spread your payments over 18, 24, 30, or 36 months. Business discounts may apply, if available. Call 1-800-642-7676 for details.
Get started

Enjoy the benefits of Surface All Access for Business

Payments on your schedule

Spread your payments over 18, 24, 30, or 36 months.

Access to the latest tech

Upgrade to the newest devices three months prior to the end of your lease.¹

Expert support when you need it

Our business product experts can help you find the right solutions and unlock member discounts.²
Call us at 1 800-642-7676

                                                                                                                                                           

Choose the products and payment plan for your business

Build customized bundles with the devices, accessories, software, and peace of mind your business needs. Then choose the payment schedule that’s right for you.
Visit LiftForward to build your plan

Surface All Access for Business is powered by LiftForward

LiftForward provides a revolving line of credit to give you more purchasing power.³
Sign in to LiftForward

            

Get more with Surface All Access for Business

Surface All Access for Business gets you the Surface devices and accessories your business needs at a monthly price that fits your budget. Plus, you have the option to upgrade your hardware to the latest tech at the end of your term.
[1] Requires account in good standing, return of device/accessory packaging, and execution of new lease documentation.
  • [2] Software support is limited to software pre-installed on Surface devices.
  • [3] Terms and conditions apply; See full agreement. See full program FAQs and Terms and Conditions for additional information. 

Surface All Access for Business

Get more with Surface All Access for Business

Surface All Access for Business gets you the Surface devices and accessories your business needs at a monthly price that fits your budget. Plus, you have the option to upgrade your hardware to the latest tech at the end of your term.
[1] Requires account in good standing, return of device/accessory packaging, and execution of new lease documentation.
  • [2] Software support is limited to software pre-installed on Surface devices.
  • [3] Terms and conditions apply; See full agreement. See full program FAQs and Terms and Conditions for additional information. 

PNC Vendor Finance

Enjoy low monthly payments on all your Microsoft products with business financing from PNC.1 Spread your payments across 12 to 36 months and get special business pricing on eligible devices.2

How it works

1. Get a quote from us

Before contacting PNC, chat with our AI-powered Store Assistant or call us for a product pricing quote.
Call us at 1 800-642-7676

2. Get a credit application

Contact PNC for a financing quote and credit application form.
Learn more about PNC

3. Submit your documents

Complete and send in your credit application to PNC for approval.

4. Complete your order

Once you’ve been approved, confirm your order and we’ll ship your products.

 

 

Flexible payment options through PNC

PNC is an approved funding partner for Microsoft, providing access to capital and industry-leading finance products and services when you need it, so you can keep your business running at peak performance.
Learn more about PNC

               

[1] Requires account in good standing, return of device/accessory packaging, and execution of new lease documentation.
  • [2] Software support is limited to software pre-installed on Surface devices.

PNC Vendor Finance

Enjoy low monthly payments on all your Microsoft products with business financing from PNC.1 Spread your payments across 12 to 36 months and get special business pricing on eligible devices.2

How it works

1. Get a quote from us

Before contacting PNC, chat with our AI-powered Store Assistant or call us for a product pricing quote.
Call us at 1 800-642-7676

2. Get a credit application

Contact PNC for a financing quote and credit application form.
Learn more about PNC

3. Submit your documents

Complete and send in your credit application to PNC for approval.

4. Complete your order

Once you’ve been approved, confirm your order and we’ll ship your products.

 

 

Flexible payment options through PNC

PNC is an approved funding partner for Microsoft, providing access to capital and industry-leading finance products and services when you need it, so you can keep your business running at peak performance.
Learn more about PNC

               

[1] Requires account in good standing, return of device/accessory packaging, and execution of new lease documentation.
  • [2] Software support is limited to software pre-installed on Surface devices.
